title: ок's more cobble
description: Vanilla+ mod that adds cobblestone to all stone types
body:
![ок's more cobble](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d66641881d28ba53a012d3653e7831fdd8afde56.png)

Vanilla+ mod that adds cobblestone variants and their mossy variants to all the stone types, such as Cobbled Granite, Endstone, Calcite, Basalt and more.

Credit to LazyPillow for Cobbled Endstone and Tuff textures
